title: Cyan Rose (Classic)
description: Replaces the Blue Orchid with the Cyan Rose from early Pocket Edition. (Classic)
body:
# <center>![Cyan Rose Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa5e14022acc2cb4dcd7c34df0fbd669fd3a724b.png)</center>
Thanks for checking out Cyan Rose! Cyan Rose <u>replaces the Blue Orchid to the Cyan Rose from early Pocket Edition.</u> You are viewing the "Classic" Version, [go here to download the Modern Version.](https://modrinth.com/project/cyan-rose)

## FAQ

### Does this require any external mods?
Nope. <u>This Resource Pack does not need any external mods for it to function properly.</u>

### Can you put this pack on CurseForge?
<u>I do not plan to put this pack on CurseForge, and probably never will.</u>

### On some versions of Minecraft it says "The pack is too old"
On these versions "supported_formats" in pack.mcmeta was not introduced yet, because of that it looks at "pack_format" and says on the lines of "Pack format 5? (pack format for 1.15.2) That is old. This pack must not work on me anymore" even though the pack supports that version. Best you can do is <u>just ignore it and enable the pack anyway.</u>

### Did you make the Pixel Art yourself? (Modern Version question)
<u>Yes!</u> and you are free to use it on whatever project your working on. Credit would be appreciated, but its not mandatory, just dont copy the Resource Pack outright and publish it claiming its your own.
